scope: Correct the three Anthropic pricing maps (Pricing, anthropicPricing, bedrockPricing) so claude-sonnet-5 is priced (not silently $0) and claude-opus-4-8 is billed at $5/$25 instead of the stale $15/$75 Opus 4.1 copy.

reachability.evidence: go test ./internal/model/ -run 'TestPricing_Sonnet5|TestPricing_Opus4_8CorrectedRate' -v drives the real exported ComputeCost: sonnet-5 (1M/1M tokens) = $12.00 (was $0 pre-slice, unknown-model fall-through); opus-4-8 (1M/1M tokens) = $30.00 (was $90.00 pre-slice, stale $15/$75 rate). Both PASS.

delivered.item: AC-01: claude-sonnet-5 added to Pricing, anthropicPricing, and bedrockPricing (anthropic.claude-sonnet-5); ComputeCost/computeAnthropicCost/PriceForModel all resolve non-zero (PriceForModel confirmed transitive, no client.go edit needed).
AC-02: active claude-sonnet-5 rate is $2.00/$10.00 per 1M tokens, consistent across all three maps.
AC-03: code comment on each claude-sonnet-5 entry documents both the $2/$10 intro rate and $3/$15 standard rate, states the 2026-08-31 expiry, and instructs the flip.
delivered.evidence: internal/model/pricing.go, internal/model/anthropic.go, internal/model/bedrock.go (comments above each claude-sonnet-5 entry)

delivered.item: AC-04: claude-opus-4-8 corrected from {15.00, 75.00} to {5.00, 25.00} in all three maps; no stale value remains.
AC-05: pricing_test.go asserts corrected values via the real exported ComputeCost.

AC-06: audited anthropic_test.go and bedrock_test.go for hardcoded price assertions on the two changed models; none found (only reference is a client-construction test at anthropic_test.go:132, no price assertion). go build ./... and go test ./internal/model/... both green.
delivered.evidence: journal.md AC-06 audit entry; go test ./internal/model/... PASS

delivered.item: AC-07: intro->standard flip tracked as a durable GitHub issue, cited in the AC-03 comments; three maps deliberately not consolidated (deferred Type-1 refactor).

divergence: implementer.md's reference-implementation gates 'sworn coverage' and 'sworn llm-check --check ac-satisfaction/security-review' do not exist in this build's CLI (sworn --help lists no such subcommands). Ran the gate that does exist: 'sworn verify --spec --diff --proof --verifier-model'.

SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset in this environment (matches the precedent documented in S04-board-record-reconciliation's journal — an environment gap, not a slice gap). Ran the proof-bundle verification gate with --verifier-model openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 (key present in ~/.sworn/.env) instead. Verdict: PASS.

'sworn verify --proof <path>' did not write a file at the given path in this build (confirmed absent after the run) — proof.json is hand-authored from live repo state per Rule 6, as this file and journal.md document.
